mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders o WHERE o.customer_id = #{customerId} AND o.payment_status = 'PAID' AND o.customer_deleted = 0
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM order_items oi LEFT JOIN kit k ON k.kit_id = oi.kit_id LEFT JOIN bids b ON b.bid_id = o.bid_id LEFT JOIN request r ON r.request_id = b.request_id WHERE oi.order_id = o.order_id AND ( k.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%') OR r.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%') ) )
AND o.created_at >= #{search.startDate}
AND o.created_at < DATE_ADD(#{search.endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)

SELECT o.order_id, o.order_no, o.customer_id, o.business_id, o.bid_id, o.total_amount, o.payment_status, o.accept_status, o.delivery_status, o.created_at, c.nickname AS customer_nickname FROM orders o JOIN customer c ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE o.payment_status = 'PAID' AND o.bid_id IS NULL AND o.accept_status IN ('ACCEPTED', 'REJECTED')
AND c.login_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%')
AND c.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%')
AND c.phone_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%')
AND o.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%')
AND o.created_at >= #{search.startDate}
AND o.created_at < DATE_ADD(#{search.endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
ORDER BY o.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders o JOIN customer c ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE o.payment_status = 'PAID' AND o.bid_id IS NULL AND o.accept_status IN ('ACCEPTED', 'REJECTED')
AND c.login_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%')
AND c.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%')
AND c.phone_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%')
AND o.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search.keyword}, '%')
AND o.created_at >= #{search.startDate}
AND o.created_at < DATE_ADD(#{search.endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)

SELECT o.order_id AS orderId, o.order_no AS orderNo, o.customer_id AS customerId, o.business_id AS businessId, o.bid_id AS bidId, o.total_amount AS totalAmount, o.payment_status AS paymentStatus, o.accept_status AS acceptStatus, o.delivery_status AS deliveryStatus, o.created_at AS createdAt FROM orders o WHERE o.order_id = #{orderId} AND o.customer_deleted = 0

SELECT oi.order_item_id, oi.order_id, oi.kit_id, o.business_id, oi.quantity, oi.price, COALESCE(k.name, '개인거래 상품') AS product_name, k.main_image1 AS image_url, (SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM review r WHERE r.order_item_id = oi.order_item_id) AS reviewed FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON o.order_id = oi.order_id LEFT JOIN kit k ON k.kit_id = oi.kit_id WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT o.order_id, o.order_no, o.customer_id, o.business_id, o.bid_id, o.total_amount, o.payment_status, o.accept_status, o.delivery_status, o.created_at, c.nickname AS customer_nickname FROM orders o JOIN customer c ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE o.payment_status = 'PAID' AND o.accept_status = 'PENDING' AND o.bid_id IS NULL ORDER BY o.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET delivery_status = #{deliveryStatus} WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
UPDATE orders SET accept_status = #{acceptStatus} WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_items (order_id, kit_id, quantity, price) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{kitId}, #{quantity}, #{price})
